items.title: 🔥 Hot Drops: Coming Soon
items.excerpt: Hot Drops are here — exclusive, limited-edition cosmetics available for a limited time, starting with the Starfire Crown Hat.

items.title: Summer Daily Leaving Soon
items.excerpt: Summer Daily leaves on July 12th — last chance to grab the All Access Pass and any missed cosmetics.

items.title: SUMMER SALE: 50% off ALL ranks, plus free gifts with purchase
items.excerpt: Biggest discount ever on Hive+ and Hive Ultimate, plus a free Uncle Banana costume and bonus gift token with qualifying purchases.

items.title: July Quest Costume Released
items.excerpt: The Cacti Bandit costume can now be purchased from the Quest Store.
